tasks.subject: Task 1: Intent contract — AnimeStreamContext with episode count and hoster
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The player receives `episodeAmount` and `hosterName`, delivered through a single context object instead of a growing positional parameter list.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/resolver/StreamResolutionResult.kt:17-71`
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/AnimeScreen.kt:129-155`, `:252-259`
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/stream/StreamActivity.kt:60-98`, `:276-291`
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/stream/TvStreamScreen.kt:78`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `AnimeStreamContext` carries `id`, `name`, `episode`, `episodeAmount`, `language`, `coverUri`, `hosterName`.
- [ ] `Video.makeIntent`/`Video.play` take `AnimeStreamContext?` plus `forceInternal`.
- [ ] `StreamActivity.episodeAmount` returns `-1` when absent; `hosterName` returns `null`.
- [ ] `AnimeScreen` passes the real `episodeAmount` and the tapped stream's hoster.
- [ ] `StreamActivity.openInOtherApp` and `TvStreamScreen` still compile and behave as before.

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin detekt` → `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/resolver/StreamResolutionResult.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/AnimeScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/stream/StreamActivity.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/stream/TvStreamScreen.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin detekt", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AnimeStreamContext carries id, name, episode, episodeAmount, language, coverUri, hosterName", "makeIntent/play take AnimeStreamContext? plus forceInternal", "StreamActivity.episodeAmount returns -1 when absent and hosterName returns null", "AnimeScreen passes real episodeAmount and the tapped stream's hoster", "openInOtherApp and TvStreamScreen still compile"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Player manager — playback-ended signal and resettable start position
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `StreamPlayerManager` reports when an episode finishes and can be reset to a specific start position.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/stream/StreamPlayerManager.kt:74-93`, `:199-266`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `playbackEndedSubject: PublishSubject<Unit>` emits exactly once per transition into `Player.STATE_ENDED`.
- [ ] The existing `PlayerState.PAUSING` emission on `STATE_ENDED` is unchanged.
- [ ] `reset(startPosition: Long = -1)` seeds `lastPosition` with `startPosition` so the new media starts there.

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin detekt` → `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/stream/StreamPlayerManager.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin detekt", "acceptanceCriteria": ["playbackEndedSubject emits once per STATE_ENDED transition", "existing PlayerState.PAUSING emission on STATE_ENDED unchanged", "reset(startPosition) seeds lastPosition and seeks the local player"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: StreamEpisodeViewModel with tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A ViewModel that resolves a neighbouring episode to a playable `Video`, preferring the current hoster, and bookmarks when configured to.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/stream/StreamEpisodeViewModel.kt`
- Create: `src/test/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/stream/StreamEpisodeViewModelTest.kt`
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/MainModules.kt:325`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `navigateTo(episode, preferredHoster)` emits `EpisodeNavigationTarget(episode, video)`.
- [ ] The preferred hoster is tried first when that episode has it.
- [ ] `Link`/`App`/`Message` results and resolver errors are skipped, not fatal.
- [ ] Streams with no resolver, or whose resolver sets `ignore`, are never attempted.
- [ ] Non-public streams are skipped when logged out.
- [ ] When nothing yields a `Video`, `episodeNavigationError` is set and the result stays null.
- [ ] `bookmark(episode)` calls the endpoint only when `areBookmarksAutomatic` and `isLoggedIn`.
- [ ] `isNavigating` is false after the call terminates.

**Verify:** `./gradlew testDebugUnitTest --tests "me.proxer.app.anime.stream.StreamEpisodeViewModelTest"` → 11 tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/stream/StreamEpisodeViewModel.kt", "src/test/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/stream/StreamEpisodeViewModelTest.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/MainModules.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew testDebugUnitTest --tests \"me.proxer.app.anime.stream.StreamEpisodeViewModelTest\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["navigateTo emits EpisodeNavigationTarget on success", "preferred hoster tried first when present", "Link/App/Message results and resolver errors are skipped", "streams without a resolver or with ignore set are never attempted", "non-public streams skipped when logged out", "error set and result null when nothing resolves to a Video", "bookmark gated on areBookmarksAutomatic and isLoggedIn", "isNavigating false after termination"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Autoplay setting
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Users can turn autoplay off; it defaults to on.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/util/data/PreferenceHelper.kt:33-43`, `:108-118`
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/settings/SettingsScreen.kt:64`, `:279`, `:306`, `:360`, `:380`, `:441-459`, `:706`, `:726`
- Modify: `src/main/res/values/strings.xml`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `isAutoplayNextEpisodeEnabled` reads/writes key `autoplay_next_episode`, defaulting to `true`.
- [ ] The settings screen shows a switch bound to it, directly after the auto-bookmark row.
- [ ] `SettingsContentPreview` compiles with the new parameters.

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin detekt` → `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/util/data/PreferenceHelper.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/settings/SettingsScreen.kt", "src/main/res/values/strings.xml"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin detekt", "acceptanceCriteria": ["isAutoplayNextEpisodeEnabled uses key autoplay_next_episode defaulting to true", "settings switch rendered after the auto-bookmark row", "SettingsContentPreview compiles with the new parameters"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: In-place episode swap in StreamActivity
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The activity can replace the playing episode without restarting, with correct position bookkeeping on both sides of the swap.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/stream/StreamActivity.kt:162-197`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `switchToEpisode(episode, video, clearOutgoingPosition)` saves the outgoing position, swaps the intent, and restarts at the incoming episode's stored position.
- [ ] `clearOutgoingPosition = true` writes `0` for the finished episode.
- [ ] `onNewIntent` and `switchToEpisode` share one implementation.
- [ ] `hasNextEpisode`/`hasPreviousEpisode` are false when `episodeAmount` is `-1`.

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin detekt` → `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/stream/StreamActivity.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin detekt", "acceptanceCriteria": ["switchToEpisode saves outgoing position, swaps intent, restarts at incoming stored position", "clearOutgoingPosition writes 0 for the finished episode", "onNewIntent and switchToEpisode share applyStreamIntent", "hasNextEpisode/hasPreviousEpisode false when episodeAmount is -1"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Player UI — navigation buttons and autoplay countdown
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The player shows next/previous buttons when those episodes exist, and counts down into the next episode when one finishes.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/stream/StreamScreen.kt:66-271`, `:273-441`, `:443-473`
- Modify: `src/main/res/values/strings.xml`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Previous/next `IconButton`s appear only when that neighbour exists.
- [ ] Pressing one calls `navigateTo`, and the resolved result swaps the episode.
- [ ] Advancing forwards calls `bookmark(newEpisode)`; going backwards does not.
- [ ] A countdown card appears on end when autoplay is enabled and a next episode exists.
- [ ] The countdown is cancellable and does not run while the activity is not resumed.
- [ ] A second `STATE_ENDED` for the same episode does not start a second countdown.
- [ ] Navigation failures show a toast and leave playback untouched.

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin detekt testDebugUnitTest` → `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`, 376 tests, 0 failures

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/stream/StreamScreen.kt", "src/main/res/values/strings.xml"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin detekt testDebugUnitTest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["prev/next buttons shown only when the neighbour exists", "pressing a button navigates and swaps the episode", "forward advances bookmark, backward does not", "countdown card appears on end when autoplay enabled and next exists", "countdown cancellable and gated on RESUMED", "duplicate STATE_ENDED does not restart the countdown", "navigation failure shows a toast and leaves playback untouched"]}
```
